name: sync-local-doc-to-data-wiki
displayName: Sync Local Docs to Lark Data Wiki
description: Personal lark-cli workflow for publishing local Markdown documents into a configured Lark/Feishu Data Wiki directory.

data_wiki_parent.title: Data Wiki parent
data_wiki_parent.description: Optional parent Wiki URL or node token for the Data Wiki directory. Leave empty to provide it per request.

data_wiki_space_id.title: Data Wiki space ID
data_wiki_space_id.description: Optional Wiki space ID. Leave empty to discover it from the parent node.

lark_cli_bin.title: lark-cli binary
lark_cli_bin.description: Path or command name for the local lark-cli executable.

lark_cli_identity.title: lark-cli identity
lark_cli_identity.description: Identity passed to lark-cli when needed: auto, user, or bot.
